confidence_rationale: This video is a medical educational/instructional program featuring clinical consultation, patient examination, teaching rounds, and expert narration by an OB/GYN physician. It does NOT contain any FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) task performance. No laparoscopic trainer, instruments, pegs, sutures, gauze, ligating loops, or foam models are visible. The content is clinical education and professional development, not a scored FLS simulation task.
cannot_determine: Task identity — no FLS apparatus or task-specific materials present
Completion time — no discrete task performance recorded
Score — video does not contain scoreable FLS activity
technique_summary: This is educational/instructional content featuring clinical consultation, physical examination demonstration, and teaching rounds. It is NOT an FLS performance video and should not be scored using FLS rubrics.

demonstrated_techniques: Clinical patient consultation and imaging review
Teaching rounds and group medical education
verbal_cues: Speaker introduces credentials and educational context
Clinical discussion and patient interaction demonstrated
Teaching environment with multiple trainees observing
common_errors_addressed: Video demonstrates proper professional and clinical conduct

note: This submission does not contain an FLS task performance. If an FLS task video was intended, please provide video of a trainee or expert performing one of the five FLS tasks (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture) on the official trainer box.
